## Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case
Explain the use case or scenario where this feature would be valuable. What problem does it solve?

## Desired Behavior
Describe in detail what you'd like to see implemented.

## Benefits
Why should this feature be added? What value does it provide to users?

## Device & App Info
- **App Version:** [Pre-filled by app]
- **Device Manufacturer:** [Pre-filled by app]
- **Device Model:** [Pre-filled by app]
- **Android Version:** [Pre-filled by app]
- **Android SDK Level:** [Pre-filled by app]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
